content_blocks.text:
अमृतकिरणवीर्याङ्कीर्यमाश्रित्य सर्वे विदधति फलमेते खेचराः साध्वसाधु ।
निजनिजविषयेषु व्याप्रियन्ते यधामून्यलमिह मनसैवाधिष्ठितानीन्द्रियाणि ॥
दिनेशचन्द्रौ राजानौ सचिवौ जीवभार्गवौ ।
कुमारो वित्कुजो नेता प्रेष्यस्तपननन्दनः ॥ २ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
अमृतकिरणवीर्याङ्कीर्यमाश्रित्य सर्वे विदधति फलमेते खेचराः साध्वसाधु ।
निजनिजविषयेषु व्याप्रियन्ते यधामून्यलमिह मनसैवाधिष्ठितानीन्द्रियाणि ॥
दिनेशचन्द्रौ राजानौ सचिवौ जीवभार्गवौ ।
कुमारो वित्कुजो नेता प्रेष्यस्तपननन्दनः ॥ २ ॥

content_blocks.text:
The Sun and the Moon are sovereigns.
Guru and Sukra are counsellors. Budha is the (heir
apparent) young prince; Mars is the commander-in-
chief and Saturn is the servant.

verse_data.translation:
The Sun and the Moon are sovereigns.
Guru and Sukra are counsellors. Budha is the (heir
apparent) young prince; Mars is the commander-in-
chief and Saturn is the servant.

content_blocks.text:
NOTES.
In saying that the Sun and the Moon are Sovereigns, it must.
bę understood that the Sun is the King, the Moon being the Queen.
Similarly, Jupiter is the Mantri ( मंत्रिन्) and Venus his wife
of. (सूर्य जातक)

भई राजा शशी राशी नेता भूमिसुतः खगः ।
सौम्यः कुमारो मन्त्री च गुरुस्तद्वल्लभा भृगुः ॥
प्रेप्यस्तयेव संप्रोक्तः सर्वदा तनुजो मम ।
एषां प्रयोजनम् । 'जन्मनि प्रश्नलने वा यो ग्रहः सबलः स राजस्था
दिकं करोति । निर्बलो राजस्वादिनाशकरः । यद्वा जन्मनि प्रश्नकाले वा बल-
बामुपचयस्थो यो ग्रहः स्यात्तदा तदुक्तो राजादिकस्तस्य साधकः स्यादन्यथा
हामिकरः' ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
भई राजा शशी राशी नेता भूमिसुतः खगः ।
सौम्यः कुमारो मन्त्री च गुरुस्तद्वल्लभा भृगुः ॥
प्रेप्यस्तयेव संप्रोक्तः सर्वदा तनुजो मम ।
एषां प्रयोजनम् । 'जन्मनि प्रश्नलने वा यो ग्रहः सबलः स राजस्था
दिकं करोति । निर्बलो राजस्वादिनाशकरः । यद्वा जन्मनि प्रश्नकाले वा बल-
बामुपचयस्थो यो ग्रहः स्यात्तदा तदुक्तो राजादिकस्तस्य साधकः स्यादन्यथा
हामिकरः' ॥
verse_data.topic: Verse and commentary on planetary roles and significations

content_blocks.text:
Further, the Sun is the lord of the six sigus from Simba
taken in the negative side while the Moon is the lord of the six
signs from Kataka counted in the positive side. It is by these
'two planets that the supremacy over the other 10 signs has been
given to Mars and the other planets. For example, the 2nd
place from the Sun (negatively) has been allotted to Mercury.
The 3rd Rasi has been given to Venus who is the minister. The
Vahana Stthana (वाइनस्थान) or the 4th house has been given over
to Mars who is the cominander-in-chief: The 5th house is the
house of knowledge, and has been allotted to Jupiter, To the
servant Saturn has been allotted the 6th house or house of sor

verse_data.translation:
Further, the Sun is the lord of the six sigus from Simba
taken in the negative side while the Moon is the lord of the six
signs from Kataka counted in the positive side. It is by these

given to Mars and the other planets. For example, the 2nd
place from the Sun (negatively) has been allotted to Mercury.
The 3rd Rasi has been given to Venus who is the minister. The
Vahana Stthana (वाइनस्थान) or the 4th house has been given over
to Mars who is the cominander-in-chief: The 5th house is the
house of knowledge, and has been allotted to Jupiter, To the
servant Saturn has been allotted the 6th house or house of sor
